epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: FPG ≥126 mg/dL, 2-h PG ≥200 mg/dL, HbA1c ≥6.5% (ADA/WHO criteria)

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Free access glucometer screening at PHC level; confirmation at CHC using laboratory HbA1c/FPG
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: NPHCE guidelines; metformin first-line, SGLT2 inhibitors for CVD/CKD; insulin when needed
regionalChallenges: High treatment costs for advanced therapies
Fragmented care between public and private sectors
strongPoints: National NCD screening program at HWCs
